items.title: Chemtech KD6 Wiped Film Evaporator
items.short: Complete production-ready short path distillation system — full turnkey setup, ready to run from day one.
items.overview: Complete production-ready short path distillation system built around the Chemtech KD6. This is a full turnkey setup — everything you need to run distillation from day one is included. The system has been properly maintained and is ready to go to work.
included: Leybold turbo pump for deep vacuum
Multiple Julabo heating baths and circulators covering evaporator, feed tank, condenser, residue, and cold trap zones
DART Controls speed controllers for feed, residue, and distillate pumps
UL-listed Apex Industrial Automation control panel, 230V 3-phase, with vacuum display, emergency stop, and individual circuit breakers
items.inspection: Properly maintained and ready to work. Available for inspection by serious buyers.
items.logistics: Located in Anaheim, CA. Available for inspection by serious buyers. Buyer is responsible for pickup and transportation.

items.title: Ethanol Falling Film Evaporator — 50L
items.short: High-throughput falling film for continuous ethanol solvent recovery.
items.overview: Continuous falling film evaporator for high-volume ethanol solvent recovery. Recovers warm solvent for immediate reuse, keeping your extraction line moving. Tested and functional.
items.inspection: Bench tested and operational. Inspection welcome by appointment.
items.logistics: Located in Anaheim, CA. Buyer arranges freight; crating available.

items.title: Closed-Loop Hydrocarbon Extractor — 20 lb
items.short: Fully jacketed 20 lb closed-loop hydrocarbon system, C1D1 rated.
items.overview: Closed-loop hydrocarbon extraction system rated for C1D1 environments. Fully jacketed columns and collection base for temperature control, with recovery pump included.
items.inspection: Pressure tested. Available for inspection by serious buyers.
items.logistics: Located in Anaheim, CA. Buyer responsible for pickup and transport.

items.title: Rotary Evaporator — 20L
items.short: 20L rotovap with digital heating bath and full glassware.
items.overview: 20-liter rotary evaporator for solvent recovery and concentration. Includes digital heating bath and complete glassware set. Clean and tested.
items.logistics: Located in Anaheim, CA. Crating and freight available.

items.title: Vacuum Oven — 7.5 cu ft
items.short: 7.5 cu ft vacuum oven with five heated shelves and pump.
items.overview: Large-capacity vacuum oven for purging and drying. Five heated shelves with even temperature distribution. Vacuum pump included.
items.inspection: Heats and holds vacuum. Inspection by appointment.
items.logistics: Located in Anaheim, CA. Buyer arranges freight.

items.title: Short Path Distillation Kit — 12L
items.short: 12L short path glassware kit with heating mantle.
items.overview: Complete 12-liter short path distillation glassware kit with heating mantle. A solid entry point for small-batch distillation.
items.inspection: Sold — shown as an example of past inventory.
